{{Infobox group
| name = Elder cultists
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Elder]] cultists are human followers who worship the [[Elders]], a group of powerful and alien entities. While many people doubt the actual existence of the [[Elders]], viewing them as mere myths or spirits, the presence of these cultists is widely recognized. Recruitment into these groups often involves exploiting the uneducated, spreading misinformation, using brainwashing, bribery, or targeting those who are emotionally vulnerable. However, a small number of individuals join because they hold a genuine belief that the [[Elders]] will provide salvation for humanity. These cults engage in various rituals, some of which involve extreme physical mutilation to prove their devotion to the [[Great Ones]], such as blinding themselves. Different groups have been identified, including the [[Thousand Eyes]] and several organizations that have recently unified under a single banner known as the [[Sleepless]]. The [[Sleepless]] include factions such as the [[Lamplighters]], the [[Sisters of the Fading Moon]], and the [[Eyes of Crossing]]. These cultists may work to deepen divisions between human [[Guilds]], potentially serving the interests of the [[Great Elders]]. Some cultists may even sacrifice their own lives to provide vitality to structures like the [[Elder wall]].}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Elder cultists]] may be sustaining the [[Elder wall]] by feeding their lives into it.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Nathanael Bareius]] is in league with the [[Elder cultists]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] have looked into the [[Elder cultists]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] views [[Calder]] as a potential [[Elder]] cultist.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Elder cultists]] are known to be real.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
